Document:
# Rule 2 - Stay in-character and do your job [color=#a4885c]Players participating in Command roles, Security roles, or playing as Antagonists will be held to a higher standard of roleplay. Players in those roles have the ability to dramatically shift the trajectory of the round and can heavily influence the experience of others, both positively and negatively.[/color]
While Boomer Station is a light-hearted and goofy server, it is a medium role-play server. You are expected to and are required to roleplay. Netspeak, such as the usage of terms like "lol" "XD" and "uwu", is not permitted on our servers, as it is not considered roleplay. You can be anything from an eccentric scientist to a grizzled security officer, but you should strive to stay in-character while doing so.
Unless the situation is dire, a janitor shouldn't break into medbay to grab supplies, and a chef shouldn't hack into engineering to set up the supermatter engine. A janitor should go around the station and clean, and a chef should make sure the kitchen counter is stocked with food. If you want to do a different job, have the HoP or Captain change it. You also must have a reasonable name. "Bonerfart" is an acceptable name for a clown, but not a cargo technician.
##Greytiders (Trespassers): You are considered valid to kill under server rules if you are caught and refuse to leave after being demanded to leave a department. Anything that happens to you after your refusal to comply is whatever happens. A good faith attempt to make the greytider leave needs to be done prior to taking any drastic action.
